name: Kitsune Battlemage
short_description: Kitsune Battlemage is a multiplayer action-spellcasting game where you bend the elements to your will in magical combat. Master devastating spells and hone your skills as you crush, burn, and freeze other players or a horde of enemies in the training grounds.

About the Game

[b]Kitsune Battlemage[/b] is an intense elemental magic combat game where you're not limited to any specific school or style of magic. Choose your abilities and wage battle using powerful combinations of elemental spells! [imgvid poster.avif="" webm="" mp4="" width="480" height="180"][/imgvid] [b]Choose[/b] abilities from any of the elements and switch things up to engage in tactical spellcasting battles. About the Game

Support us by Wishlisting


Hello I am Brian and this is my first publicly released game, thanks for checking it out!
Kitsune Battlemage is an intense elemental magic combat game where you're not limited to any specific school or style of magic. Choose your abilities and wage battle using powerful combinations of elemental spells!


Choose abilities from any of the elements and switch things up to engage in tactical spellcasting battles.


Battlemages enter the training grounds via portals that connect worlds. Train your skills against others in elemental combat!


Master the elements: Fire, Frost, and Earth. Choose your abilities to match your playstyle, fit your team, and battle your opponents!

KEY FEATURES:
  • Online arena combat
  • Offline horde mode
  • Choose any combination of Fire, Earth, and Ice magic
  • Health, mana, and stamina resources that can be attacked via different skills
  • Primary attacks have stacking buffs and debuffs
